title: LATERN 30CM Christmas Wreath, Artificial Christmas Front Door Wreath Merry Christmas Pine Garland with Bowknot Glitter Flower Red Berry Ball for Door Wall Fireplace Window Xmas Tree Decoration
features: [High quality] Made of high quality velvet and plastic, eco-friendly and non-toxic, strong and durable, not easy to deform and fade, firmly fixed, not easy to loosen and shed, can be reused for many years
[Christmas Wreath] The wreath is decorated with a variety of Christmas elements: velvet bow, glitter flowers, red berries, balls and ''Merry Christmas'' etc, realistic shape and bright color
[Easy to use] Lightweight design, just use the hook (not included) to hang the wreath anywhere want to decorate; After the season, can be easily stored for use next year, can easily maintain shape
[Size] Diameter: 30cm, perfect size for decorating door and wall etc; Please note that the Christmas wreath may look flatten by transportation, please tidy it up a little, it will be more fluffy

[Applicable] Perfect for decorating front door, wall, indoor, outdoor, window, fireplace, farmhouse, living room, porche, suitable for use in parties, weddings, festivals, Christmas, winter, Thanksgiving, celebrations, etc.
